_comment: List of firms whose career pages are scraped directly via their applicant tracking system (ATS) API. 'type' must be 'greenhouse', 'lever', or 'workday'. Verify/expand this list over time -- the scraper safely skips any entry that 404s. Greenhouse: token is from https://boards.greenhouse.io/<token>. Lever: token is from https://jobs.lever.co/<token>. Workday: visit the firm's careers page -- the URL looks like https://<tenant>.<wdHost>.myworkdayjobs.com/<site> (e.g. wd1, wd3, wd5); set 'tenant', 'wdHost', and 'site' from that URL. Example (not verified): { "name": "Example Bank", "type": "workday", "tenant": "examplebank", "wdHost": "wd1", "site": "External" }
